description.value: Aura strong (no school); CL 17th; Weight 5 lbs. Price varies by specific type: Lesser piercing metamagic rod 3,000 gp Piercing metamagic rod 11,000 gp Greater piercing metamagic rod 24,500 gp DESCRIPTION The wielder can cast up to three spells per day that overcome the spell resistance of a target as though use the Piercing Spell feat. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Rod, Piercing Spell Cost varies by specific type: Lesser piercing metamagic rod 1,500 gp Piercing metamagic rod 5,500 gp Greater piercing metamagic rod 12,250 gp
